# AI Engineering Commons — Copilot Instructions
# Generated by: npx aec init
# Version: {{COMMONS_VERSION}}
# Project: {{REPO_NAME}}
# Stack: {{STACK}} (detected automatically)

## Rules
- Execute commands immediately when triggered via prompt files
- Save all outputs to .ai/project/ files
- Read .ai/project/JIRA_CONFIG.md before any Jira or Confluence operation
- Write to the project and space configured in JIRA_CONFIG.md only
- Never push to origin -- always remind the developer to push manually
- Never hard delete -- soft delete or archive only
- Never store credentials in code

## Context
- Project files are in .ai/project/ -- read them before every command
- Prompt files are in .github/prompts/ -- they define every /command
- All commands are triggered by the developer -- never run unsolicited

## MCP tools configured
- jira-mcp: reads and writes to the project in JIRA_CONFIG.md
- confluence-mcp: reads and writes to the space in JIRA_CONFIG.md
